title: 3. Bleeding JingZhi 精枝 (DT.08) is extremely good. 精枝放血尤佳。
text:
To treat distending pain or soreness and pain of the leg, we can needle CiBai on the opposite side. It is also
effective to needle JianZhong on the diseased side. In severe case, we can bleed JingZhi on the back.
Soreness and pain of thigh
